content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Reconcile transport, BOM, HTML declarations, decoder support, replacement characters, and confidence with source offsets.

hints: For Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Defend the Charset Precedence model · Theory Charset Preced…, name the owner, authorization, source and emitted revision, Node, TypeScript, URL, robots, unknown value, Fetch, Promise, AbortSignal, browser, accessibility, report, handle, recovery, and native-transfer boundary, Charset Precedence precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Defend the Charset Precedence model · Theory Charset Preced…, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A theory TypeScript team handles case 2278 during an authorized municipal service audit. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to reconcile coding, media, charset, source identity, truncation, and stage-specific digests; every Promise, stream, listener, timer, socket, file, browser context, and report sink needs one cleanup owner; then change one owner permission, seed, URL, robots, sitemap, redirect, DNS, media, or encoding decision and reconcile provenance. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, Cheerio, Playwright, axe-core, files, processes, packages, containers, assistive-technology review, load, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Reconcile transport, BOM, HTML declarations, decoder support, replacement characters, and confidence with source offsets.

For Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Defend the Charset Precedence model · Theory Charset Preced…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: TextDecoder default behavior correctly decodes every web page.

checks.failureMessage: Add the exact evidence marker // Evidence: crawler-ts-charset-precedence-ysv1kj.

checks.pattern: // Evidence: crawler-ts-charset-precedence-ysv1kj(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?function\s+evidence_crawler_ts_charset_precedence_ysv1kj\s*\([^)]*\)\s*:\s*Readonly<\{[^}]+\}>\s*\{(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?representationCases < 12)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?admittedRepresentations < 6 \|\| admittedRepresentations > representationCases)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?rejectedRepresentations < 4)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?partialRecords > 0)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return)(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return
